content.problemStatement:
In a Chess match "a + b", each player has a clock which shows aaa minutes at the start and whenever a player makes a move, bbb seconds are added to this player's clock. Time on a player's clock decreases during that player's turns and remains unchanged during the other player's turns. If the time on some player's clock hits zero (but not only in this case), this player loses the game.

There's a 3 + 2 blitz chess match. After NNN turns (i.e. ‚ĆäN+12‚Ćč\left\lfloor \frac{N+1}{2} \right\rfloor‚Ćä2N+1‚Äč‚Ćč moves made by white and ‚ĆäN2‚Ćč\left\lfloor \frac{N}{2} \right\rfloor‚Ćä2N‚Äč‚Ćč moves made by black), the game ends and the clocks of the two players stop; they show that the players (white and black) have AAA and BBB seconds left respectively. Note that after the NNN-th turn, b=2b = 2b=2 seconds are still added to the clock of the player that made the last move and then the game ends.

Find the total duration of the game, i.e. the number of seconds that have elapsed from the start of the game until the end.
constraints: there is at least one valid game consistent with the input
content.inputFormat:
The first line of the input contains a single integer TTT denoting the number of test cases. The description of TTT test cases follows.
The first and only line of each test case contains three space-separated integers NNN, AAA and BBB.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, print a single line containing one integer ‚ÄĒ the duration of the game.

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
Example case 1: The total time given to both clocks after 101010 turns is 2‚čÖ(180+10)=3802 \cdot (180 + 10) = 3802‚čÖ(180+10)=380 seconds. The total time left at the end is 0+2=20 + 2 = 20+2=2 seconds. The duration of the game is 380‚ąí2=378380 - 2 = 378380‚ąí2=378 seconds.
Example case 3: The total time given to both clocks after 121212 turns is 2‚čÖ(180+12)=3842 \cdot (180 + 12) = 3842‚čÖ(180+12)=384 seconds. The total time left at the end is 192+192=384192 + 192 = 384192+192=384 seconds. The duration of the game is 384‚ąí384=0384 - 384 = 0384‚ąí384=0 seconds.
